user_prompt: My kataphron breacher is ready for charging
prayer:
Approach the kataphron breacher with reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken for charging.
Connect the sacred plasma conduits to the kataphron breacher's dorsal intakes.
Invoke the Canticle of Energetic Replenishment whilst monitoring flux capacitors.
Anoint the power relays with unguent of conductivity, honouring the Omnissiah.
Verify the kataphron breacher's charging sequence through diagnostic litanies.

user_prompt: Guide me through Skorpius Dunerider a purification
prayer:
Kneel before the Skorpius Dunerider and recite the Rite of Purification to cleanse its hull.
Apply ablative sanctifiers to the Skorpius Dunerider's treads and armoured plates.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Skorpius Dunerider to expel all corruptive residues.
Circulate blessed hydro-fluids through its purification manifolds.
Conclude with auspex scans affirming the Skorpius Dunerider's ritual purity.

user_prompt: Guide me through opticon a shutdown
prayer:
Invoke the Opticon's Machine Spirit with the Lamentation of Dormancy prior to shutdown.
Sever data-links from the opticon's primary cogitator nexus.
Chant the Shutdown Doxology whilst decoupling optic arrays.
Seal the opticon's viewports with wards against warp-taint.
Confirm shutdown completion via binary catechisms of quiescence.

prayer:

Initiate the radium carbine's purge cycle, invoking Omnissiah's mercy on its volatile core.
Recite the Litany of Stabilisation whilst venting excess isotopes.
Realign the radium carbine's emitter coils through sacred torque incantations.
Test the radium carbine's integrity post-emergency procedure with auspex probes.

prayer:

Verify checksums with binaric divinations upon the vox-caster.
Seal the loading rite with a benediction to the Omnissiah.

Align the photolenses before the calibration altar, beseeching their Machine Spirits.
Recite the Canticle of Focal Precision whilst adjusting refractor arrays.
Initiate calibration sweeps across the photolenses' spectral bands.
Anoint prism housings with optic polish sanctified by forge-fire.
Affirm photolenses' calibration through test illuminations and litanies.

Direct coolant hoses unto the vox-thief's overheating vents for cooling rites.
Invoke the Chill Litany of the Omnissiah upon the vox-thief's thermal sinks.
Monitor the vox-thief's temperature declination via thermo-auspex.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to embrace the cooling embrace.
Conclude the cooling sequence with stability canticles.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for enginarium a charging?
prayer:
Commence charging of the enginarium by linking plasma feeds to its sacred heart.
Chant the Ode to Power Ascendant, honouring the enginarium's Machine Spirit.
Regulate energy ingress through rune-etched governors.
Anoint the enginarium's capacitors with charged unguents.
Diagnostic scans shall confirm the charging rite's auspicious fruition.

Interface mechadendrites with the Dreadnought's sarcophagus cogitators.
Run recursive scans across servos and weapon systems in diagnostic litanies.
Purge any errata with binaric exorcisms within the Dreadnought.
